title: InferenceRuleStatus
description: Durable definition and materialization state for an RDF inference rule.

dirty.description: Whether source RDF changed after the last successful materialization.

graphUri.description: Named graph containing triples materialized by this rule.

lastError.description: Most recent materialization error, if any.

lastMaterializedAt.description: Timestamp of the most recent successful materialization.

systemRule.description: Whether the rule is part of the shipped starter pack.

tripleCount.description: Number of triples in the rule's materialized graph.
